message:
fix(selection): Correct test comment for runtime vs slot check ordering

Updates test comment to reflect that the bug has been fixed - runtime check
now correctly happens before slot check, so busy workers return
AllWorkersBusy instead of the incorrect NoWorkersWithRuntime.

**Before (bug):**
Runtime check happened after slot check, causing a busy worker to report
"no workers with runtime" instead of "all workers busy" when slots were
exhausted.

**After (fix verified):**
Test assertion and comment now document correct behavior:
```rust
// BUG FIX VERIFIED: Runtime check now happens before slot check,
// so busy workers correctly return AllWorkersBusy (not NoWorkersWithRuntime)
```

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
